ddls:
CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the laboratory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the laboratory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the laboratory */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the laboratory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory that made the prediction */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "num" INTEGER /* Number of predictions made by the laboratory */,
  "rmsd" REAL /* Root mean square deviation (RMSD) of the predicted structure */,
  "di_all" REAL /* DI all metric of the predicted structure */,
  "inf_all" REAL /* INF all metric of the predicted structure */,
  "inf_wc" REAL /* INF wc metric of the predicted structure */,
  "inf_nwc" REAL /* INF nwc metric of the predicted structure */,
  "inf_stacking" REAL /* INF stacking metric of the predicted structure */,
  "clash_score" REAL /* Clash score of the predicted structure */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the predicted structure */,
  "mcq" REAL /* MCQ metric of the predicted structure */,
  "tm_score" REAL /* TM-score of the predicted structure */,
  "best_sol" INTEGER /* Best solution found by the laboratory */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Protein sequence */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory that provided the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., experimental, synthetic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory that developed the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Description of the training data used for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being evaluated */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric used for evaluation */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_models" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions and roles of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)
